mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_car_plate (community_id, house_no, owner_id, car_number, car_brand, car_model, car_color, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{houseNo}, #{ownerId}, #{carNumber}, #{carBrand}, #{carModel}, #{carColor}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, house_no, owner_id, car_number, car_brand, car_model, car_color, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time, deleted_time FROM sys_car_plate WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_car_plate SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
